notes: Chunk contains a single event: 10-Q accession 0001410578-25-001564 (MD&A), part 1 of 2; names coined only from this visible part.
No fiscal_kpis in this chunk (fiscal_kpis present only on chunk_001).
All 31 evidence quotes verified as exact substrings of the event content.

Flagship-brand comparable sales not coined as a separate brand driver because the brand string equals the company legal name (banned in names); captured via same_store_sales, average_check, customer_traffic, menu_pricing, menu_mix.
new_unit_development used instead of 'restaurant openings' because 'opening' is a banned state word.

Skipped 12 considered items as vague/boilerplate/mechanical: tariffs, foreign exchange, minimum wage, insurance costs, supply chain disruptions, construction costs (all forward-looking risk laundry-list only), interest expense (flat, table-only), stock-based compensation (EBITDA recon item), acquisition contingent consideration (adjustment noise), average sales per operating week (needs glue word 'per'; covered by comps + operating weeks), inventory/working-capital movement (mechanical), gift card/delivery/rewards initiatives (strategy boilerplate).
